ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the company */,
  "company_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the company */,
  "company_founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "company_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "company_ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "company_market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data point */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the data belongs to */,
  "item" TEXT /* Financial item (e.g., Net Income, Depreciation) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data is for */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the financial item */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial item (foreign key to financial_items) */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year (foreign key to years) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the financial data is reported */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the financial data (e.g., SEC filings, annual reports) */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Status of the audit (e.g., audited, unaudited) */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES financial_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial item */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the financial item (e.g., income, expenses, assets) */,
  "item_units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the financial item (e.g., USD, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which financial data is available */,
  "year_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fiscal year */,
  "year_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the industry */,
  "industry_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent industry (for hierarchical structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sector */,
  "sector_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_industry" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_sector" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position or title of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access event */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., financial, operational) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
